message:
🐛 Fix paho-mqtt deprecation warning — use CallbackAPIVersion.VERSION2

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -157,7 +157,7 @@ def main():
     args = parser.parse_args()
 
     # Connect to MQTT
-    mqtt_client = mqtt.Client(client_id="water_quality_monitor")
+    mqtt_client = mqtt.Client(mqtt.CallbackAPIVersion.VERSION2, client_id="water_quality_monitor")
     if args.mqtt_user:
         mqtt_client.username_pw_set(args.mqtt_user, args.mqtt_pass)
     mqtt_client.connect(args.mqtt_host, args.mqtt_port, MQTT_KEEPALIVE_SECONDS)
